status: MERGED -- PR #1222 squash-merged to main at commit 4627a3bd6303074f1e19d744418e051c82804da3. This bundle's sha_binding is now bound to that merge SHA.

targeted_tests.note: 5 pre-existing tests (unaffected regression) + 5 new tests loading the real .lane/lanes/governance.yml via loadLaneManifest('governance') and asserting AGENTS.md + docs/06_status/INCIDENTS/** are now accepted, the legacy lowercase form still works, and unrelated/near-miss paths remain rejected.

pnpm_verify.note: Full env:check + lint + type-check + build + test (including live-DB-backed suites already present in the repo) ran green on this branch. Re-confirmed with a fast pnpm verify:quick pass immediately before this bundle was authored.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

queries.description: database-smoke.test.ts inserts and deletes a real submission row as part of the persist-submission-and-settlement live write-path test
database-smoke.test.ts inserts and deletes a real pick row as part of the persist-submission-and-settlement live write-path test
database-smoke.test.ts selects pick_lifecycle rows to verify no lifecycle event is written on an invalid atomic enqueue (UTV2-920 rollback test)
database-smoke.test.ts selects distribution_outbox rows to verify status/receipt/lifecycle/audit rollback on an invalid atomic delivery confirmation (UTV2-920 rollback test)
database-smoke.test.ts selects distribution_receipts rows as part of the same atomic-delivery rollback verification
database-smoke.test.ts selects audit_log rows to verify no audit row is written on an invalid atomic settlement (UTV2-920 rollback test) and that a re-settlement correction is additive (UTV2-996)
database-smoke.test.ts inserts settlement_records rows to verify a correction chain is additive and the original settlement row is not mutated (UTV2-996)
database-smoke.test.ts verifies no duplicate participants for the same external_id and sport (UTV2-883)

runtime_proof.row_counts_note: Live table row counts queried directly against the zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm Supabase project via mcp__claude_ai_Supabase__execute_sql immediately after the pnpm test:db run above. This diff's own scope (.lane/lanes/governance.yml + scripts/lane-contract.test.ts) has no DB dependency -- this runtime proof exists to satisfy the unconditional T1 runtime_proof_required gate, not because the diff itself touches database code.

sha_binding.verified_source_note: The real merge commit SHA for PR #1222 on main, bound via ops:proof-generate --merge-sha (rebindEvidenceJsonSha).
sha_binding.merge_sha_note: PR #1222 merged to main (squash) at this SHA. post-merge-lane-close.yml's automated closeout failed with infra_error (manifest had no pr_url recorded pre-merge) so this binding was completed via a governed follow-up repair PR instead.
